summary: FIX: all source, package, dependency, authorization, template, schema, golden-suite, dogfood, and package-dry-run checks passed, but the canonical installed packed-consumer gate failed because its retained package approval digest is stale.

artifacts.name: release-gate-evidence.md
artifacts.content:
# Release Gate Evidence

## Binding authentication

- Candidate compilation: `sha256:db47c3393dca0ede877bf07eecc89cd89cb7241f8380fb65f1ed8513221b2dd7` (authenticated).
- Candidate package: `sha256:fde922b7e3c2f4747e04c92dacea8af3c7083fa87cd3bcf029f92b2b1ce632b3` (authenticated by reconstruction and `verifySpecialistPackage`).
- Generated contract: raw `sha256:5c9ecaff0252add9d4ba97127e32e182f4aefdf47db8d6018f95aa21f138a35e`, 27,146 bytes; blueprint `sha256:312e2d84669ae76ad5a7c642dc6875d66082a36a6eb3872c44f79b7ef3c00029`.
- Declared review sources: 34/34 matched exact raw SHA-256 and byte bindings.
- Candidate package files: 9/9 matched manifest or preparation-handoff raw bindings, including compilation, six contracts, integration contract, and manifest.
- Required dependency handoff: raw `sha256:fdc12e61dc982d81cb1f219ff2f22e97bb7500693209e863e100d5a81c6542c1`, 18,810 bytes; dependency agent, goal, compilation, package, completed work, and PASS outcome matched.
- Launch authorization: raw `sha256:6f54ecde2ea4805106d500d0653bf06df366a57bf2364d57e0f78c7ec8c04087`, 1,344 bytes; Candidate A digest pair matched. Its receipt and semantic handoff bindings both matched exact raw digest, byte count, and PASS outcome.

## Containment

- Verified worktree spelling `C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24` resolves to the authorized candidate worktree.
- `TEMP` and `TMP` were `C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\temp`.
- npm cache was `C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache`.
- A child Node process and `npm.cmd config get cache` confirmed the same contained roots before canonical gates.
- Post-gate `git diff --name-only` was empty; no tracked file was edited by this specialist.

## Exact canonical commands

1. `$env:TEMP='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\temp'; $env:TMP='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\temp'; $env:npm_config_cache='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache'; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\check-template.ps1`
2. `$env:TEMP='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\temp'; $env:TMP='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\temp'; $env:npm_config_cache='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache'; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\test-check-template.ps1`
3. `$env:TEMP='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\temp'; $env:TMP='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\temp'; $env:npm_config_cache='C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache'; npm.cmd run verify`

## Gate results

- Template checker: PASS, 1 repository check.
- Full negative checker matrix: PASS, 119/119 cases.
- Canonical `npm.cmd run verify`: FIX (exit 1).
- Format check before failure: PASS, 77 files.
- Lint before failure: PASS, 64 files.
- Typecheck before failure: PASS.
- Unit and integration tests before failure: PASS, 364/364 tests, 0 failed, 0 skipped, 0 cancelled.
- Read-only specialist first run: PASS, 2/2 sources verified, 2 candidate teams evaluated, 5 package files approval-verified, 0 agents executed.
- V10 dogfood evidence check: PASS.
- V11 dogfood evidence check: PASS; Candidate A digests reproduced, 6 agents selected from 203 evaluated candidates, Audit B digests reproduced, receipt PASS, launch authorization PASS.
- Package dry run: PASS; `swecircuit-0.0.0.tgz`, 114 files, 134.6 kB packed and 753.8 kB unpacked.
- Installed packed consumer: FIX. The TypeScript host exited 1 because retained package approval `sha256:09554abda9e551d922443f0a049a76dc6c8b862e6b9b6aacdf3bb8573beabd3b` did not match rendered package `sha256:913c04c71beaef362e81a1859f740587e2cf0017a83585d5c6468cbda2e84a43`. The compilation digest remained `sha256:92881440b8d0b58de756bd706631ed4481565b20fd3cadad669637006b157659` on both sides.

## Failed attempts and disposition

- The first local raw-authentication helper assumed a nonexistent `manifest.files` array and exited before review; it was corrected to the published manifest shape and then authenticated all required bindings.
- The first containment preflight could not create the authorized temp child under sandbox policy and used an unavailable legacy PowerShell path helper; the approved rerun succeeded before any canonical gate.
- Canonical outcome is FIX because the installed-consumer gate failed. No source or evidence bytes were changed. A new candidate revision must refresh the retained installed-package package digest and repeat every canonical gate.
